name: gio-system
description: A language learning system powered by AI agents. Practice through voice and text conversations with feedback tailored to your level and goals.

scripts.server: if [ -f .env ]; then node --env-file=.env server.ts; else node server.ts; fi
scripts.test: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then node --env-file=.env --test test/*.test.ts test/integration/*.test.ts; else node --test test/*.test.ts test/integration/*.test.ts; fi' sh
scripts.gio: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then node --env-file=.env agents/agent-reception-orchestrator.ts "$@"; else node agents/agent-reception-orchestrator.ts "$@"; fi' sh
scripts.lesson: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then node --env-file=.env agents/agent-lessons.ts "$@"; else node agents/agent-lessons.ts "$@"; fi' sh
scripts.exercises: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then node --env-file=.env agents/agent-exercises.ts "$@"; else node agents/agent-exercises.ts "$@"; fi' sh
scripts.vocabulary: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then node --env-file=.env agents/agent-vocabulary.ts "$@"; else node agents/agent-vocabulary.ts "$@"; fi' sh
scripts.news: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then node --env-file=.env agents/agent-news.ts "$@"; else node agents/agent-news.ts "$@"; fi' sh
scripts.cronjob: if [ -f .env ]; then node --env-file=.env cronjob.ts; else node cronjob.ts; fi
